entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `emoji` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_data_types_emoji_description
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_data_types_emoji_description` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`emoji`, `description`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `date` TEXT NOT NULL, `dataTypeId` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`dataTypeId`) REFERENCES `data_types`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_daily_entries_date_dataTypeId

indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_daily_entries_dataTypeId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`dataTypeId`)
